data.title: WORK Medical Technology Group LTD priced $2.9 million Registered Direct Offering of 38,999,334 Class A ordinary shares at $0.075 each.
data.description: Hangzhou, China, September 25, 2025 - WORK Medical Technology Group LTD (Nasdaq: WOK) announced today that it has finalized a deal with several investors for the acquisition of 38,999,334 Class A ordinary shares, valued at $0.075 per share, through a registered direct offering. The agreement also includes pre-funded warrants as an alternative to shares, with an identical purchase price, excluding the $0.0005 per share exercise price. WORK Medical is a leading supplier of medical devices in China, operating through its subsidiary Work (Hangzhou) Medical Treatment Equipment Co., Ltd. and other branches across the country.

data.title: Linden Creek expands to Lancaster and York, PA, offering interior design services. Luxury firm from Raleigh, NC opens new franchise location.
data.description: Luxury interior design and home staging firm, Linden Creek, from Raleigh, North Carolina, has revealed the launch of its latest franchise in Lancaster and York counties in Pennsylvania. The new location aims to cater to a rapidly increasing demand for their services in the area.

data.title: Mission Wealth ranked in Barron's Top 100 RIA Firms list for 2025, offers free strategy sessions to align investment portfolios with long-term goals.
data.description: To adapt to changing market trends and potential interest rate reductions, Mission Wealth, a leading RIA firm, is now providing a free strategy consultation for families across the country. Their headquarters in Santa Barbara, California announced this initiative on September 25, 2025. This tailored session aims to assist individuals in aligning their investment strategies with their future financial objectives.

data.title: Google urges Supreme Court to step in conflict with Fortnite creator, potentially reshaping revenue models on Android.
data.description: This particular case has the potential to revolutionize the strategies through which businesses generate revenue using Google's mobile operating system.

data.title: New York Life donates $75,000 to Bronx YMCAs via New York Yankees partnership for youth programs.
data.description: In a recent initiative in New York, the renowned life insurance company, New York Life, has generously contributed $75,000 to Bronx YMCAs. This donation was made possible through the Strikeout Series partnership of New York Life with the New York Yankees, aimed at bolstering youth programs in the Bronx community.

data.title: True Link and Huntington Bank collaborate to provide family banking solutions, addressing challenges for over 100 million Americans.
data.description: In San Francisco, a prevalent but overlooked financial challenge in banking today is assisting loved ones in managing their finances. Over 100 million Americans aid an aging parent, support a family member with a disability, guide a teenager, or assist someone in recovery. Despite this, most banks and credit unions lack tools to support these daily needs. A staggering 86% of Americans who help manage someone else's finances express that it would be beneficial if their financial institution provided such assistance.

data.title: I.R. Gilyeat & Co releases AI Truth Teller 1.1.0 with AI image detection, uses large language models for accuracy.
data.description: GILBERT, Ariz.--I.R. Gilyeat & Company introduced AI Truth Teller version 1.1.0, featuring AI image detection. The latest upgrade allows users to discern between genuine photographic images and AI-generated ones. Leveraging advanced large language models and cutting-edge image/text processing technology from top AI firms, AI Truth Teller aims to enhance accuracy in AI detection. This development showcases the integration of multiple AI technologies for improved functionality.

data.title: tea protocol launches its token on CoinList to reward open-source developers, fostering security & sustainability.
data.description: In ZUG, Switzerland, tea, the protocol supporting a reward system for open-source software, has revealed that its token is now accessible on CoinList (coinlist.co/tea). This development signifies a crucial advancement towards establishing a stable and safe environment for open-source advancement in the era of artificial intelligence. The tea token facilitates a novel open-source economy, ensuring that developers receive compensation for their input, while also integrating security measures into the software supply chain. This innovative approach comes at a time when artificial intelligence is fast-tracking application development and underscores the importance of rewarding developers for their efforts.

data.title: Belden Inc inaugurates Pune Plant 2 in India, a $40 million investment for growth, safety, sustainability, and solutions.
data.description: Belden Inc., a prominent global provider of comprehensive connection solutions, has recently launched its Pune Plant 2 in India, marking a noteworthy achievement for the company's dedication to innovation, operational efficiency, and sustainable expansion. Dr. Ashish Chand, Belden's President and CEO, spearheaded the inauguration ceremony alongside the senior leadership team. This new facility is a significant advancement for Belden in the Asia Pacific Region, with five stories dedicated to enhancing operations. This development reflects Belden's commitment to growth and progress in the region.

data.title: Moveworks partners with Microsoft, joins Microsoft Marketplace, strengthening AI solutions for enterprises.
data.description: A California-based AI platform for enterprises, Moveworks, has been made available in the recently unified Microsoft Marketplace. This development signifies a significant milestone in the ongoing partnership between the companies, aimed at providing secure and scalable AI solutions to clients. Moveworks, known for empowering employees regardless of their location, serves as a comprehensive platform for engaging with various systems within the Microsoft ecosystem. This collaboration comes after years of cooperation and entails a focus on delivering efficient services to customers, emphasizing the importance of accessibility and reliability.

data.title: Huey Magoo's marks 21 years with BOGO deal, introduces new flavors for fall; celebrates serving "The Filet Mignon of Chicken®."
data.description: For more than 20 years, the popular chicken tender brand, Huey Magoo's, has been serving their renowned "The Filet Mignon of Chicken®." Recently, they have introduced new menu items including a Hot Honey Sauce and Candy Corn Lemonade. The brand is located in Orlando, Fla. and has experienced significant growth.

data.title: InventHelp Inventor from Vegreville, AB, Canada creates portable urination device named REDECOP for females.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 25, 2025, an inventor from Vegreville, AB, Canada, unveiled a new creation called REDECOP aimed at providing women with a portable solution for urination in the absence of a traditional restroom. The inventor expressed the motivation behind the invention, stating that it can be used conveniently while traveling in a vehicle, camping, and in various other situations. The innovative design offers a practical way for females to address their restroom needs in different scenarios, showcasing the inventor's commitment to solving a common issue.

data.title: Subaru announces 2026 Solterra priced at $38,495 MSRP, with Solterra XT model offering 338 horsepower and 25% increased range.
data.description: The latest Solterra XT model has expanded its range by over 25% compared to the previous versions. The new Solterra XT generates an impressive 338 horsepower from an enhanced powertrain. Charging efficiency has been notably improved, with the ability to charge from 10-80% in about 30 minutes due to an advanced battery preconditioning system and charging speeds that reach up to 150 kW. Additionally, this model comes standard with...

data.title: EMPIRE invests in Elevation Sky Park to create San Francisco's landmark entertainment space at Pier 70.
data.description: A collaboration has been established between a prominent music industry leader in San Francisco and an innovative immersive entertainment pioneer to develop pioneering programming at the renowned Pier 70. On September 25, 2025, Elevation Sky Park San Francisco (ESP SF) revealed a significant investment as per PRNewswire.

data.title: Archer Roose Wines partners with Princess Cruises, offering canned wine fleetwide, with co-owner Elizabeth Banks.
data.description: Hollywood star Elizabeth Banks, who co-owns the highly praised canned wine brand, Archer Roose Wines, was featured in a recent promotional advertisement celebrating their new partnership. The commercial was released in New York on September 25, 2025. Archer Roose Wines, a rapidly expanding brand, can now be found on all Princess Cruises ships as their exclusive wine offering. This move marks the first official partnership between the two companies, bringing the popular canned wine to a wider audience aboard the cruise fleet.
